description:
Webhooks are primary, but they can drop. A scheduled job pulls case status from MDI and compares to our mirror; any drift becomes an audit row + alarm.

**Scope**
- `workers/src/jobs/reconcile-mdi-cases.ts` — runs every 6h via EventBridge (T-046).
  - For all `cases` with `mdi_updated_at` in the last 24h, fetch `GET /partner/cases/:id` and compare.
  - If status differs: update the mirror, write `audit_log` (`case.drift_corrected`), emit Datadog metric `mdi.case_drift_count` (>0 alarms).
- Bounded: max 500 cases per run, paged by `mdi_updated_at` desc.
- Lower-frequency backfill (`reconcile-mdi-cases-full`, weekly) covers older cases to catch stragglers.

**Acceptance**
- Artificially stale a mirror row → next reconciler run corrects it and writes a drift audit.
- Drift counter remains 0 in normal operation (sanity check).
title: MDI case-status reconciliation job (6h drift detection)
